Off Calendar Mar-14-2006 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed. The court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 225. Proceedings reported by: Rhonda Fung, CSR#4819. (212)

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jan-19-2006 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-19-2006 Case Settled - Set For Crc 525 Hearing On Mar-14-06 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses To Plaintiff'S First Set Of Request For Identification And Production Of Documents To Plaintiff Saccani Distributing Company, And Does 1 Through 100, And For Award Of Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Oct-18-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Defendant's motion to compel further responses to request for production of documents set #1 is granted. No opposition has been filed. The objections, other than those based on the attorney client or attorney work product privileges are overruled and stricken. Defendant is ordered to respond and to produce responsive documents within 15 days of notice of this order. Any documents withheld shall be identified with particularity in a privilege log. The Court finds that plaintiff failed to make a reasonable and good faith effort to resolve the matters in dispute and to identify any documents withheld with particularity. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $536.30 are to be paid within 15 days of notice of this order. Prevailing party to submit form of order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN
